guidance.en: This form is completed BY THE COURT after reviewing your DV-100 request. The judge checks which temporary orders are granted pending the hearing. You do not fill this out — the court does.
guidance.es: Este formulario es completado POR EL TRIBUNAL después de revisar su solicitud DV-100.

guidance.en: The court will set a hearing date within 21-25 days. You MUST serve the restrained person with these papers before the hearing date.
guidance.es: El tribunal fijará una fecha de audiencia dentro de 21-25 días.

common_errors.en: Failing to serve before the hearing date. If not served, the TRO expires and you must refile.
common_errors.es: Failing to serve before the hearing date. If not served, the TRO expires and you must refile.

guidance.en: The restrained person must be personally served with: DV-100, DV-109, DV-110, and blank DV-120. Service must be by someone 18+ who is NOT a party to the case. Keep the proof of service (DV-020).
guidance.es: La persona restringida debe recibir servicio personal de los documentos.
